Article Title: Tiger Woods net worth in 2026, inside his golf career, earnings, and major car crash incidents over the years
Article Text:
Tiger Woods net worth in 2026, Inside his golf career, earnings, and major car crash incidents over the years (Image via getty)

Tiger Woods’ golf career, major wins, and how his income grew beyond the sport

Tiger Woods’ car crash incidents in 2009 and 2021 and how they changed his life and career

Tiger Woods’ 2026 car crash and arrest in Florida add new chapter to his off course struggles

Tiger Woods has built a net worth of about $1.5 billion in 2026. That makes him the richest golfer ever. Even now, when he plays less due to injuries, his money keeps growing. Most of it does not come from golf wins anymore. It comes from big brand deals, smart business moves, and long-term investments. His journey is not just about trophies. It also includes serious injuries and car crashes that changed his life.Tiger Woods started young, but everything changed in 1997 when he won the Masters at just 21. That win made him a global star overnight. After that, he kept winning. Over the years, he reached 82 PGA Tour wins and 15 major titles, which puts him among the greatest in golf history.On the course, he earned around $121 million in prize money. That sounds huge, but it is only a small part of his total wealth. Most of his money came from brands. His long deal with Nike alone brought in hundreds of millions. Even after that partnership ended, he stayed strong in business.Now, he runs his own clothing brand, Sun Day Red. He is also part of the TGL indoor golf league. These ventures keep his income steady. Reports say he still earns over $70 million a year, mostly from off-course work.His company, TGR Ventures, also plays a big role. It handles his investments, golf design projects, and media work. This is why his money keeps growing even when he is not playing much.Tiger Woods’ life has also seen difficult moments, especially with car crashes. The first major one happened in 2009 outside his Florida home. His SUV hit a fire hydrant and a tree. No serious injuries were reported, but the incident brought heavy media attention and personal troubles.The more serious crash happened on February 23, 2021, near Los Angeles. His car rolled over at high speed on a curved road. According to the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Office, there was no alcohol involved. The main cause was high speed.This crash left him with severe leg injuries. Doctors had to insert rods, screws, and pins to stabilize his right leg. For a while, it was not clear if he would walk properly again, let alone play golf.But Tiger Woods returned. In 2022, he played at the Masters again. He walked the course with visible pain but strong determination. Since then, he has played limited events, choosing his schedule carefully. These accidents slowed his playing career, but they did not stop his financial growth. In fact, they pushed him to focus more on business and long-term plans.As of March 27, 2026, Tiger Woods was involved in another car crash near his home in Jupiter Island, Florida, and this time it led to his arrest. According to the Martin County Sheriff’s Office and reports from ESPN and Reuters, Woods was driving a Land Rover at high speed when it clipped a truck’s trailer and rolled over.He was not seriously injured, but officers said he showed signs of impairment and arrested him on suspicion of DUI. A breath test did not show alcohol, but police believe medication or drugs may be involved, and he also refused to take a urine test. He now faces misdemeanor charges, including DUI, property damage, and refusal to submit to testing.
Article Summary: Tiger woods has built a net worth of about $1.5 billion in 2026. That makes him the richest golfer ever. Most of it does not come from golf wins anymore. It comes from big brand deals, smart business moves, and long-term investments. His journey is not just about trophies but also includes serious injuries and car crashes.

Article Title: Magic Johnson: “My journey living with HIV”: Years later, Lakers legend Magic Johnson makes candid admission about fighting with fatal disease
Article Text:
Magic Johnson. Image via: Allen Berezovsky/ Getty Images

Magic Johnson addresses HIV in a recent conference

HIV forced Magic Johnson's early retirement from the NBA

Poll What inspires you most about Magic Johnson’s journey? His basketball achievements His personal resilience

Magic Johnson has endured the hardest part of his life. Decades after that life-altering diagnosis, his HIV diagnosis is still one of the major parts of his story. Speaking recently, Johnson once again opened a window into that journey, reminding people how far both he and public understanding of HIV have come.Long before becoming a global businessman and advocate, Johnson built a legacy with the Los Angeles Lakers. Five championships, countless accolades, and a style that changed basketball. Yet, he was forced into early retirement. Of course, Johnson has made a glorious basketball resume, but it is fair to assume that if he had played a few more years, his legacy would have been even greater.On Thursday, Johnson stood in front of more than 1,000 employees at ViiV Healthcare in Atlanta and spoke with the same clarity that once guided the Lakers’ offense.His message blended leadership, business lessons, and something far more personal.“This morning I had the privilege of speaking with over 1,000 employees and sales team members of ViiV Healthcare in Atlanta, GA about leadership, teamwork, how I built my business, and my journey living with HIV,” Johnson wrote on Instagram, adding, “The employees were so enthusiastic, engaging and received my message well! Thank you to ViiV Healthcare VP, Head of Sales US Kristin Fink for having me!”Since retiring, Johnson has built an empire through Magic Johnson Enterprises and invested in teams like the Los Angeles Dodgers and Washington Commanders.Still, he continues to use his platform to educate and inspire.The turning point came on November 7, 1991. At just 32, Johnson delivered news that surprised the sports world."Because of the HIV virus that I have obtained, I will have to retire from the Lakers, today,"There was a wave of stigma that surrounded HIV at the time. Even Johnson admitted his first thought was grim. "At the very first, when he first announced it to me, I thought: 'Oh, man, I am going to die. I think it's over.' And he said: 'No, no, it's not like that,'" Johnson previously said.Later, Magic Johnson became an advocate of awareness of the disease theorugh the Magic Johnson Foundation."I am going to be a spokesman for this HIV virus because I want them (the kids) to understand that safe s*x is the way to go," he said.Even amid public fear, some questioned playing alongside him. Concerns from players like Karl Malone reflected the uncertainty of that era. But Johnson’s biggest challenge was not public reaction. It was personal.“The toughest thing I thought I had to do was play Michael Jordan and Larry Bird. But actually, the toughest thing I had to do was to drive home and tell Cookie about HIV,” Johnson said.Support from his wife, Cookie Johnson, became his foundation. Today, decades later, Johnson continues to live with HIV without developing AIDS.Johnson is widely regarded as one of the greatest point guards in NBA history, leading the iconic “Showtime” Los Angeles Lakers to five championships (1980, 1982, 1985, 1987–88) while earning three MVP awards (1987, 1989–90). A 12-time All-Star and nine-time All-NBA First Team selection, he also claimed three Finals MVP honors. Known for his exceptional passing and court vision, Johnson led the league in assists four times during his illustrious career.
Article Summary: Hiv forced magic johnson's early retirement from the nba in 1991. He continues to live with hiv without developing aids. Johnson is widely regarded as one of the greatest point guards in nba history. Since retiring, johnson has built an empire through magic johnson enterprises.

Article Title: Hades 2: Xbox Partner Preview March 2026: Hades 2 gets a gonsole date, Stranger Than Heaven Spans five eras, and more announcements
Article Text:
Microsoft just held its Xbox Partner Preview showcase, revealing nearly 20 third-party games in 30 minutes. The biggest announcement was Hades 2 coming to Xbox and PS5 on April 14, available on Game Pass from day one. Ryu Ga Gotoku's Stranger Than Heaven got a new trailer confirming a five-era, five-city story structure. Other highlights included a STALKER 2 expansion, Dispatch's Xbox port, and Rebellion's new sci-fi title Alien Deathstorm.

Hades 2 is finally coming to Xbox—and PS5

Stranger Than Heaven goes big—five cities, five time periods

The Expanse: Osiris Reborn sets a beta date before its 2027 launch

STALKER 2 is getting its first major expansion this summer

Dispatch is finally making the jump to Xbox

The Atomfall team's next game involves aliens and very bad weather

Hunter: The Reckoning kicks off the World of Darkness again

Serious Sam makes a surprise comeback with a multiverse twist

Grave Seasons is a farming sim—with something dark underneath

Everything else from the showcase





The show also had a lot more packed into its 30 minutes.



Wuthering Waves, the free-to-play open-world action-RPG from Kuro Games, is coming to Xbox in July 2026.



Super Meat Boy 3D launches in just four days, on March 31, and will be on Game Pass.



Forever Ago, a quiet road trip narrative game from Annapurna Interactive, is coming to Xbox, PS5, and Switch 2 in fall 2026.



Ascend to Zero is a cyberpunk roguelite with time-manipulation combat, landing July 13.



Frog Sqwad—yes, that spelling—is an eight-player co-op puzzle game coming to Xbox in June.



Bluey's Happy Snaps is a photography adventure starring everyone's favourite blue heeler, out this fall.



Moosa: Dirty Fate is a third-person action game set in feudal Korea from the Gungrave G.O.R.E. developer, due in 2027.



The Eternal Life of Goldman is a hand-drawn platformer with a new demo available today.



Vaunted is a sci-fi tactical RPG with three unreliable narrators, coming later this year.



Artificial Detective, the showcase's closer, is a post-apocalyptic mystery game where you play as a robot trying to figure out what happened to humanity—out in 2027.



Microsoft just wrapped up its latest Xbox Partner, a 30-minute showcase dedicated entirely to third-party games. Nearly 20 titles were on show, ranging from a new Yakuza-style epic to a Bluey photography game for kids. No Persona 4 Revival date. No Witcher 3 DLC. But there was still plenty to talk about.Here's everything announced.The headline announcement: Hades 2 is leaving its Nintendo Switch 2 and PC exclusivity behind. Supergiant's critically acclaimed roguelike sequel hits Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, and Cloud on April 14. It will also launch on PlayStation 5 on the same date. The game will be available through Xbox Game Pass from day one.The showcase's most substantial showing came from Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio, the team behind the Like a Dragon series. Their new IP, Stranger Than Heaven, is shaping up to be seriously ambitious. The new trailer confirmed the game spans five distinct historical eras across five cities—expect the same chaotic combat and obsessive attention to detail that made the Yakuza games a cult staple. No release date yet, but Xbox is hosting a dedicated showcase for the game on May 6.Owlcat Games brought new gameplay for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, a third-person action-RPG set in the TV show's universe. You play a custom captain building out a crew—think Mass Effect with an Expanse coat of paint. A closed beta kicks off on April 22. The full game is targeting a Spring 2027 release, and it'll land on Xbox Game Pass at launch.GSC Game World announced Cost of Hope, the first big DLC for STALKER 2: Heart of Chornobyl. The expansion centers on a conflict between the Freedom and Duty factions and takes players into the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant itself. The studio says it's packing in over 20 hours of new content. It's launching this summer across all platforms.AdHoc Studio's superhero workplace drama Dispatch was one of the standout games of 2025, and it's now confirmed for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, and Cloud this summer. The full episodic run—about a former superhero stuck dispatching a team of reformed supervillains—will be available as an Xbox Play Anywhere title.Rebellion, the studio behind last year's Atomfall and the long-running Sniper Elite series, unveiled its next project: Alien Deathstorm. It's a first-person survival adventure set on an off-world colony battered by freak storms and overrun by hostile aliens. The tone looks genuinely unsettling. It'll hit Xbox Game Pass as a day-one title when it launches in 2027.The show opened with the world premiere of Hunter: The Reckoning – Deathwish, a first-person action game set in the World of Darkness universe—the same fictional world that houses Vampire: The Masquerade. You're hunting a vampire who's gone undercover as a cop. Nacon is publishing it, and it's due out in Summer 2027 for Xbox and PC.Nobody was really expecting a new Serious Sam game, but here we are. Serious Sam: Shatterverse brings together five alternate versions of Sam Stone, each with their own distinct abilities, to take down the series' signature villain, Mental. The series' trademark over-the-top gunplay is back, and it's launching later this year on Xbox, PS5, and PC.From developer Perfect Garbage and publisher Blumhouse Games comes Grave Seasons, a cozy farming sim that's clearly not as wholesome as it looks. The August 14 release will land on Xbox Game Pass on day one. A demo is also on the way soon, if you want to get a feel for whatever it's hiding beneath that pastoral surface.
Article Summary: Microsoft just held its xbox partner preview showcase, a 30-minute showcase dedicated entirely to third-party games. The biggest announcement was hades 2 coming to xbox and ps5 on april 14. Other highlights included a stalker 2 expansion, dispatch's xbox port, and rebellion's new sci-fi title alien deathstorm.

Article Title: Kai Trump: Kai Trump strongly backs Aryna Sabalenka over Coco Gauff after meeting her at Miami Open semifinal
Article Text:
Kai Trump and Aryna Sabalenka (Image Via Getty)

Aryna Sabalenka vs Coco Gauff final builds hype as Kai Trump shows support after semifinal win

Kai Trump, granddaughter of Donald Trump, grabbed attention at the Miami Open 2026 after openly supporting Aryna Sabalenka over American star Coco Gauff. She was present in the crowd on Thursday, March 26, when Sabalenka defeated Elena Rybakina 6-4, 6-3 in the semifinal. What stood out was not just the match, but what happened after it.Soon after the win, Kai met Sabalenka and shared the moment on Instagram. She looked excited and clearly impressed by the performance she had just seen. Instead of backing her fellow American Gauff, she showed full support for Sabalenka ahead of the final scheduled for Saturday, March 28. On her Instagram story, Kai wrote, “So much fun watching @arynasabalenka… Let’s get it on Saturday.”Sabalenka has been in strong form this season, and that showed again in Miami. Her win over Rybakina was clean and controlled. She did not look under pressure at any point in the match. That performance clearly left an impression on Kai, who watched everything from close range.Looking at the bigger picture, Sabalenka is having one of her best runs. She has already won the Indian Wells title recently and is now one match away from winning Miami as well.If she does that, she will complete what players call the “Sunshine Double,” which means winning both Indian Wells and Miami in the same season.Her journey has not been easy though. At the Australian Open earlier this year, she lost in the final to Rybakina. But she turned things around quickly and beat the same opponent in Indian Wells. That win gave her a lot of confidence coming into Miami.Now, all eyes are on her final against Gauff. This will be their 13th meeting, and so far, both players have won six matches each. So, it is perfectly balanced. Their last meeting at the WTA Finals 2025 was won by Sabalenka in straight sets.Gauff, on the other hand, will have strong crowd support as she is playing at home. She has also troubled Sabalenka in past matches, which makes this final even more interesting.If Sabalenka wins on Saturday, she will defend her Miami Open title and also make history. She could become the first woman since Ashleigh Barty in 2021 to defend the title successfully. That adds even more pressure and excitement to what is already a big match.
Article Summary: Aryna sabalenka faces coco gauff in the miami open 2026 final. Kai trump was present in the crowd to watch the semifinal win over elena rybakina. She posted a picture of her meeting with the russian star after the match.

Article Title: Alex Vesia: Alex Vesia’s wife Kayla Vesia reveals pain of losing daughter Sterling during emotional Dodgers Opening Day moment
Article Text:
Alex Vesia’s wife Kayla Vesia reveals pain of losing daughter Sterling during emotional Dodgers Opening Day moment (Image via Getty)

Alex Vesia and Kayla Vesia mark bittersweet Opening Day while remembering daughter Sterling

Alex Vesia missed World Series after family tragedy involving newborn daughter Sterling

Los Angeles Dodgers and fans support Alex Vesia family through difficult time

Opening Day brings mixed emotions as Alex Vesia returns to baseball with family in heart



Alex Vesia walked onto the field for Opening Day, but for his family, this day felt very different. While fans at Dodger Stadium were celebrating a new season, his wife Kayla Vesia was holding on to memories. She shared a deeply emotional message about their late daughter, Sterling, turning what should have been a happy day into something much heavier.Kayla Vesia was at the stadium as the Los Angeles Dodgers began their season against the Arizona Diamondbacks. But instead of just cheering, she spoke openly about her loss. In her words, it was “a very bittersweet” day. Her message quickly touched fans who remembered what the family went through just months ago.Kayla Vesia shared her feelings in a simple but powerful way. She wrote, “What I would give to have my Sterling girl here, carrying her in my heart always.”Those words showed how much she is still grieving. Opening Day is usually full of excitement, but for her, it came with pain and memories. Even while being present at the game, her thoughts stayed with her daughter.Her post connected with many fans because it felt real and honest.There were no big speeches, just a mother missing her child on a day that should have been joyful.Back in October, things took a sudden turn for the family. Alex Vesia was ruled out of the World Series due to what the team called a “deeply personal family matter.”At the time, the Dodgers were chasing another title. They went on to win the championship, but Alex Vesia was not part of it. Days later, the reason became public.The couple shared the heartbreaking news: “Our beautiful daughter went to heaven Sunday October 26th. There are no words to describe the pain we’re going through but we hold her in our hearts and cherish every second we had with her.”Their daughter, Sterling, had passed away just two days after the announcement about his absence. It was a moment that changed everything for the family.During that period, the Dodgers organization stood by Alex Vesia and his family. Teammates, staff, and fans all showed support in different ways. Messages poured in, and many fans kept the family in their thoughts.Kayla and Alex later thanked everyone who reached out. The support did not take away their pain, but it reminded them they were not alone.Even now, months later, that support still matters. Fans continue to respond to Kayla’s posts with kind messages, especially on emotional days like Opening Day.As the new season begins, Alex Vesia is back with his team. But it is clear that baseball is only one part of his life right now. His family’s loss is still very fresh.Opening Day marked a return to routine, but also a reminder of what is missing. For Kayla, being at the stadium meant facing both love for the game and the absence of her daughter at the same time.Her message made it clear that Sterling is still a big part of their lives. Even without saying much, she showed how grief stays, even during big moments.
Article Summary: Alex vesia was ruled out of the world series due to what the team called a “deeply personal family matter.” his daughter, sterling, had passed away just two days after the announcement about his absence. The dodgers organization stood by alex vesia and his family.

Article Title: Jason Heyward: Jason Heyward net worth in 2026: Inside his MLB career, earnings, Cubs title impact and retirement decision
Article Text:
Jason Heyward net worth in 2026: Inside his MLB career, earnings, Cubs title impact and retirement decision (Image via Getty)



Jason Heyward’s MLB journey from Atlanta Braves debut to six-team career and emotional retirement

Jason Heyward’s Chicago Cubs contract, 2016 World Series speech and historic championship impact



Jason Heyward net worth, salary breakdown, career earnings and major MLB contracts explained

Jason Heyward’s career stats, Gold Gloves, leadership role and legacy in Major League Baseball



Jason Heyward has officially stepped away from baseball after 16 long seasons, and for many fans, it feels like the end of a quiet but powerful era. He shared the news on MLB Network’s MLB Central on Friday, saying he is “glad and happy” to move to the other side of the game. At 36, he leaves behind a career built on strong defense, leadership, and one unforgettable World Series moment.Over the years, Heyward played for six teams and earned respect not just for his game, but for how he carried himself. His net worth is now around $80 million, with total career earnings close to $200 million. From a young star in Atlanta to a veteran voice in the clubhouse, his journey tells a full story of growth, pressure, and purpose.Jason Heyward’s story started when the Atlanta Braves picked him 14th overall in the 2007 MLB Draft. He skipped college and signed right away, slowly working his way up through the minor leagues. Then came April 5, 2010. In his very first MLB at-bat, Heyward hit a three-run home run off Carlos Zambrano. It was the kind of start every young player dreams about. People quickly started calling him “J-Hey Kid,” and expectations shot up fast.He spent five seasons with the Braves, growing into a complete player. After that, he moved to the St. Louis Cardinals in 2015, then went on to play for the Chicago Cubs, Los Angeles Dodgers, Houston Astros, and San Diego Padres. Even in his final years, when he was no longer the main star, he stayed important. Younger players looked up to him, and teams valued his calm presence.In 2015, Jason Heyward signed a huge eight-year, $184 million deal with the Chicago Cubs. It was one of the biggest contracts in team history, and it came with big expectations. While his batting numbers did not always match that deal, something bigger happened in 2016. During Game 7 of the World Series against the Cleveland Indians, there was a rain delay. Inside the clubhouse, Heyward called a players-only meeting.He told his teammates to “stick together” and “fight for your brothers.” That short talk mattered. When the game resumed, the Cubs came back and won 8-7 in extra innings, ending a 108-year title drought. That moment became the heart of his career. It showed that impact is not always about stats. Sometimes, it is about leadership at the right time.Jason Heyward’s net worth is estimated at $80 million, built over steady earnings across his long career. In total, he made around $200 million in salary. He started with a $1.7 million signing bonus after the draft. During his early years, he earned standard rookie salaries. Later, he signed a two-year $13.3 million extension with the Braves.The biggest jump came with his Chicago Cubs deal worth $184 million. Even after the Cubs released him in 2022, they still paid his guaranteed salary, including $22 million for 2023 and deferred payments through 2027.Toward the end of his career, he took smaller deals. He signed with the Dodgers for the league minimum in 2023, then a $9 million deal in 2024. He later joined the Houston Astros and signed a $1 million deal with the San Diego Padres for 2025. Even with smaller roles later, his earnings stayed strong because of smart contracts earlier.Jason Heyward finished his career with a .255 batting average, 186 home runs, and 125 stolen bases. He also won five Gold Glove Awards, showing how strong he was on defense.He made one All-Star team and was often seen as one of the smartest players on the field. He established himself as a dependable player who earned respect from others despite not reaching his initial MVP expectations. People remember him for his ability to handle pressure while assisting his teammates more than his actual statistical performance.He maintained the same level of consistency throughout his entire career from the time he began as a leading prospect until he ended his playing days as an experienced mentor. He plans to assist young athletes while maintaining his connection to the sport after he finishes his playing career. The next part of this story begins at this point.
Article Summary: Jason heyward announced his retirement from major league baseball on friday. He played for the atlanta braves, st. louis cardinals, chicago cubs, los angeles dodgers, houston astros, and san diego padres. His net worth is now around $80 million, with total career earnings close to $200 million.

Article Title: Elliotte Friedman: NHL trade rumor: Elliotte Friedman indicates uncertainty within the Toronto Maple Leafs regarding Auston Matthews' trade decision
Article Text:
Auston Matthews’ injury has fueled speculation about his playoff absence, indicating trade moves. (Image Via Twitter)

NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman clarifies the Maple Leafs' trade decision on Auston Matthews

Watch Everybody Ropes Everybody Rides | 32 Thoughts Everybody Ropes Everybody Rides | 32 Thoughts

Trade rumors surrounding Auston Matthews have been gaining traction in recent weeks, as the Maple Leafs captain will remain away for the remainder of the season due to his critical MCL injury. However, NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman has recently cleared the air about the trade speculation that is currently brewing.Earlier, Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad confusion, an injury severe enough to rule him out for the rest of the 2025-26 regular season. The Toronto Maple Leafs captain has recently undergone surgery as part of his recovery from his severe knee injury sustained in a knee-on-knee collision with Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas.It is to be noted that, till his injury, Matthews had 53 points (27 goals, 26 assists) in 60 games this season for the Maple Leafs (29-28-12), who are 14 points behind the Detroit Red Wings and Boston Bruins for the second wild card into the Stanley Cup Playoffs from the Eastern Conference. Auston Matthews’ injury has fueled speculation about his playoff absence, indicating trade moves. Matthews’ status has been clouded by a Grade‑3 MCL tear suffered in a March 12 matchup with the Anaheim Ducks, which required surgery and will keep him out for the remainder of the 2025–26 season.As he was on the verge of being traded, NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman has pushed back the rampant speculation that is doing the rounds around the Toronto Maple Leafs captain.In fact, Howard Berger had claimed earlier that Matthews could be traded to a Western team like the Anaheim Ducks, Los Angeles Kings, or Utah Mammoth, which fueled the rumor. “Got something for you. Your favorite captain will be traded this summer, to one of three Western teams: Anaheim, Los Angeles, or Utah. Mark it down. [Auston] won’t be back with the Leafs,” Berger quoted his source in his Between the Posts column.However, Elliotte Friedman has rejected the speculation and clarified in his latest “32 Thoughts” column that it is too early to make any assumption about Matthews’ intentions. Though some changes might occur within the organization, no clear direction has emerged regarding the captain’s future.“I wouldn’t rush to assume anything about Auston Matthews’ intentions. There is much to play out before we get a true understanding of how he feels. While there are changes coming in Toronto, we don’t yet know what they will be.” Friedman said.For now, Friedman has made it clear that there is still some uncertainty about the Maple Leafs' future direction, but there is no confirmed plan to trade Auston Matthews, as the player is under contract through 2027-28 with a full no-movement clause, making any trade complex.
Article Summary: Nhl insider elliotte friedman clarifies the maple leafs' trade decision on auston matthews. Matthews suffered a grade 3 mcl tear and quad confusion, an injury severe enough to rule him out for the rest of the 2025-26 regular season. Matthews’ injury has fueled speculation about his playoff absence, indicating trade moves.

Article Title: Barret Robbins: Barret Robbins cause of death: How did the ex-raiders star die at 52?
Article Text:
Barret Robbins (Image Via Getty)

Tim Brown reflects on Barret Robbins’ life, career, and difficult Super Bowl moment

The football world woke up to sad news as former NFL player Barret Robbins has passed away at the age of 52. The update came late Thursday night through his former teammate Tim Brown, who said Robbins died peacefully in his sleep. Brown shared that he received a call from Marissa Robbins, who informed him about Barret’s passing overnight. He also tried to comfort fans and loved ones by saying, “Thankfully, he passed peacefully in his sleep.”The news quickly spread among fans and former players, many of whom still remember Robbins for his strong presence on the field and his role in the team’s success during key seasons. Barret Robbins had a long journey in football.He started playing at TCU before entering the NFL. The Raiders picked him in the second round of the 1995 NFL Draft. Over time, he became one of the most reliable centers in the league, known for his strength and consistency. His best season came in 2002, when he was named First-Team All-Pro and also made the Pro Bowl, marking the peak of his career.Tim Brown, who played with Robbins from 1998 to 2003, did not just share the news.He also opened up about a difficult chapter in Robbins’ life. He spoke about the time before Super Bowl XXXVII, when Robbins went missing a day before the game. Reports at the time said he had not taken his depression medication and was later found in a confused state, which raised serious concern among teammates and staff.Because of that situation, then-head coach Bill Callahan decided Robbins was not fit to play in the Super Bowl. It was a turning point in his life and career. Brown said, “It’s unfortunate that his life was never the same after he was not allowed to play in the Super Bowl.”Even with that moment, Robbins’ career still stands strong. He played nine seasons in the NFL and was known for his strength and leadership on the offensive line. Brown also asked fans to support Robbins’ family, saying, “Please pray for their girls, his family, and tons of teammates who will be affected by this!”Many fans are now remembering Robbins not just for football, but also for the challenges he faced off the field and the effort he put into the game. His journey had highs and lows, but his impact on teammates and the sport remains clear and lasting.
Article Summary: Barret robbins passed away at the age of 52. He played nine seasons in the nfl and was known for his strength and leadership on the offensive line. His best season came in 2002, when he was named first-team all-pro and made the pro bowl.

Article Title: Idris Elba: Cupra Kiro co-owner Idris Elba backs Dan Ticktum after strong showing in Madrid: “He’s going to get there”
Article Text:
Idris Elba at Madrid E-Prix. (Image credit: Formula E)

Idris Elba impressed as Dan Ticktum and Pepe Marti secure double points for Cupra Kiro



Dan Ticktum’s performance this season



Cupra Kiro co-owner Idris Elba was present at the Circuito del Jarama when both team drivers, Dan Ticktum and Pepe Marti, scored points in the Madrid E-Prix final held last week. The Hollywood veteran was delighted with the result, particularly Marti, who was racing in his home country and finished ninth. He also expressed confidence that, with performances like Ticktum’s, who finished fourth, a victory may not be far away this season.Elba spoke about Cupra Kiro’s performance at the Madrid E-Prix, describing it as an important achievement for the team to secure double points in Spain.When asked if he was on the edge of his seat while watching Ticktum and Marti finish fourth and ninth respectively, the actor said, “Right to the end, like that last corner, literally that last corner.”He added, “It was a really exciting race and we’re really proud of the boys. They both did really well, Pepe especially. But, you know, double points is really important for us right now, so it’s good.”Speaking about Marti, he said: “Yeah, no, it was great. I mean, he took Attack Mode early and held that position. It was great for the fans, great for him. So it was a good moment.”When asked whether he could see a win coming for Ticktum after his fourth-place finish, Elba responded, “100 per cent.I mean, Dan’s got it in him and he’ll get there, he’s going to get there. I thought today was going to be it.”Dan Ticktum has been performing strongly this season, although he is yet to reach the podium. He once again topped a free practice session in Madrid and narrowly missed out on a podium finish after a close battle with Mitch Evans and Pascal Wehrlein, who finished second and third respectively, while Antonio Felix da Costa won the race.Ticktum is currently 10th in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 22 points, while Marti sits 12th with 19 points. The pair will return to racing after a month-long break, with Rounds 7 and 8 set to take place in Berlin on 2 and 3 May.Also read: Nick Cassidy opens up on maiden pole with Citroen Racing at Madrid E-Prix: “A win, a podium, a pole…”
Article Summary: Cupra kiro co-owner idris elba was present at the madrid e-prix final. Dan ticktum and pepe marti scored double points for the team. Elba said he was on the edge of his seat during the race. He also expressed confidence that a win may not be far away this season.

Article Title: Lionel Messi: Fact check: Is LEGO launching Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo sets? FIFA World Cup 2026 LEGO editions leak ahead of release
Article Text:
Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo (Image Via X)

Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo LEGO sets leaked ahead of official reveal



LEGO is rumored to join the growing excitement around the FIFA World Cup 2026. The popular toy brand is speculated to introduce new football-themed sets. Two of them are already making waves on social media. These include a detailed model of the official World Cup 2026 ball. It features a mini stadium hidden inside. Another set showcases the iconic FIFA World Cup trophy in LEGO form. Both sets have caught the attention of football fans and collectors.More products are expected to be on the way. Fresh leaks suggest that LEGO will soon release special sets inspired by two of football’s biggest legends, Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo . These stars are expected to play their final FIFA World Cup in 2026.The timing of these sets has added more excitement. Fans are going bananas over social media over the leak. However, there is little to no confirmation from LEGO on the issue as of now.According to leaks shared by BootlessBricks on Instagram, LEGO is preparing statue-style sets of both Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo. Each set is expected to include around 850 to 950 pieces. The price is likely to be $79.99. This usually matches the price in euros as well.The builds are designed to capture the iconic looks of both players in action poses.The release is rumored to be in May. These will not be the only football-themed sets arriving. LEGO is reportedly also planning four smaller diorama sets. These will focus on Messi, Ronaldo, Kylian Mbappé, and Vinícius Júnior. Each diorama will have around 490 to 510 pieces. They will also include a minifigure of the player. The price for these smaller sets is expected to be $30. For now, these are speculated prices, the official prices will be released along with the figures.The new collection highlights football’s biggest global stars. It also connects with the growing buzz around the FIFA World Cup 2026. Messi comes into the tournament as the defending champion after leading Argentina to victory in 2022. Ronaldo, on the other hand, is looking for a strong comeback. He has been dealing with injuries in recent weeks.Both players are expected to treat the 2026 tournament as a final opportunity to shine on the world stage. LEGO’s decision to release these sets now reflects their lasting impact on the sport. Fans will soon get a chance to celebrate their careers in a unique and creative way.
Article Summary: Lego is rumored to join the growing excitement around the fifa world cup 2026. The popular toy brand is speculated to introduce new football-themed sets. Fresh leaks suggest that lego will soon release special sets inspired by two of football’s biggest legends, lionel messi and cristiano ronaldo.

Article Title: Nick Cassidy: Nick Cassidy opens up on maiden pole with Citroen Racing at Madrid E-Prix: “A win, a podium, a pole…”
Article Text:
Nick Cassidy won pole in Madrid E-Prix qualifying race. (Image credit: Formula E)

Nick Cassidy has achieved a lot with Citroen Racing in just six races



Nick Cassidy secured the maiden pole for the new Formula E team, Citroen Racing, during qualifying at the Madrid E-Prix last weekend. However, the Kiwi driver was unable to capitalise on it in the Round 6 race, where he made contact with Nissan’s Norman Nato and ended up damaging his front wheel. Despite the setback, it does not take away from the achievement of becoming the first Formula E driver to take pole position for the new team.Nick Cassidy could not convert his qualifying success into a points finish in the Madrid E-Prix final, but he acknowledged that he has already achieved a great deal with the team.Reacting to his maiden pole with Citroen Racing, Cassidy said, “Yeah (speaking about Citroën’s first pole position), it was cool.It was pretty good. A win, a podium, a pole - if you’d told me that before the season, I’d have been quite happy with that. So, to have achieved them all in six races is pretty cool.”However, the driver could not turn it into a strong race result and finished towards the back of the field. Speaking about the incident, he toldFormulaE.com, “In the race, I actually touched with Norman (Nato) on the last lap. Probably mostly my fault, and I damaged the car, so I finished with a broken front wheel.It’s a good track here. It was good fun.”Citroen Racing shared a video of behind-the-scenes celebrations in the paddock as Cassidy secured the team’s first pole position. The video also featured Cassidy’s girlfriend, Nathalia Soliani.The team wrote alongside the video: “A lap to remember. There are moments in a season that shift the feeling of everything. In Madrid, Citroën Racing secured its first-ever pole position - a lap of intent, executed when it mattered most. Here’s a look back at the run that placed us at the front of the grid and marked a new chapter for the team.”Reacting to the post, a fan wrote: “Absolutely incredible from Nick & congratulations team! The most amazing feeling! Hopefully more to come!” Another commented: “Absolute master-Cass!”Cassidy went head-to-head with his namesake, Nyck de Vries of Mahindra Racing, in the duels final during qualifying. However, it was Cassidy who claimed pole, while de Vries joined him on the front row in second place.Also read: Mitch Evans on keeping Dan Ticktum at bay at Madrid E-Prix: “I was very frustrated in the car”
Article Summary: Nick cassidy secured the maiden pole for the new formula e team, citroen racing, during qualifying at the madrid e-prix. The kiwi driver was unable to capitalise on it in the round 6 race, where he made contact with nissan’s norman nato and ended up damaging his front wheel.

Article Title: Fernando Mendoza: ‘Brady’s Looking for Brady’: James Palmer drops telling Fernando Mendoza hint as Raiders’ QB debate heats up
Article Text:
James Palmer’s latest reporting added more fuel to the idea that Fernando Mendoza, not Ty Simpson, fits what Tom Brady and John Spytek want at quarterback in Las Vegas. (Image via Getty)

James Palmer’s report says more about Raiders' priorities than it does about draft certainty

Tom Brady’s Raiders role keeps hanging over every quarterback conversation



The Las Vegas Raiders still have not publicly declared their quarterback plan. That part matters. But the smoke around Fernando Mendoza is not random anymore. James Palmer’s latest comments made that clear when he tied Mendoza directly to what John Spytek and Tom Brady may want in a QB1. Las Vegas owns the No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft, and Mendoza remains one of the names most closely linked to it.Speaking on the “89” show, Palmer did not say the Raiders had made the pick. He did say this: “I do think he (Fernando Mendoza) has traits to go out there and play week one. ... I spoke with (Raiders GM) John Spytek at the combine, (Tom) Brady’s looking for Brady and that’s Fernando.” That is the line people will keep circling, because it frames this less as a raw-talent debate and more as an identity call.This is where the Mendoza-Ty Simpson discussion separates. Palmer’s point was not just about arm talent or draft buzz. It was about what Spytek and offensive staffers value beyond the throw itself. That is a real distinction.Mendoza’s résumé gives that argument some weight. He won the 2025 Heisman Trophy and led Indiana to a 16-0 season and a national title. ESPN’s draft coverage has also described him as the heavy favorite to go No.1, while Raiders media has repeatedly spotlighted him as a realistic option for that pick.That still does not equal a final decision. It does, however, suggest the Raiders may be chasing a certain profile. If Brady truly sees something familiar in Mendoza, then this is not just a quarterback evaluation. It is a philosophy play.Brady’s fingerprints are part of this story whether the Raiders say it out loud or not. He recently said he is “very happily retired” and NFL rules would require him to divest his Raiders ownership stake to return as a player. He also described himself as someone whose phone is available to help the organization build a winning culture in Las Vegas.So no, this is not about Brady making a comeback. It is about Brady helping shape what the Raiders want the next face of the franchise to look like. And if Palmer’s reporting is on the money, Mendoza may be leading that race because he checks boxes that go beyond the stat sheet.There is still time for the Ty Simpson noise to keep moving. But right now, the loudest clue out of Las Vegas is not a mock draft. It is that one Palmer quote, and it points hard at Mendoza.
Article Summary: James palmer’s report says more about raiders' priorities than it does about draft certainty. Palmer: “i do think he (fernando mendoza) has traits to go out there and play week one.... I spoke with (raiders gm) john spytek at the combine, (tom) brady's looking for brady and that's fernando”

Article Title: Carolina Marín: Carolina Marín Net Worth in 2026: Inside the earnings, endorsements and smart investments of the Spanish Olympic champion
Article Text:
Carolina Marín retired in 2026 after a remarkable career shaped by Olympic gold, world titles, and European dominance. Beyond her achievements, she built strong earnings through endorsements with brands like Yonex and made smart investments, including real estate. Despite injury setbacks, her legacy continues to inspire athletes while securing her future beyond badminton.

From Olympic gold to smart investments : how Carolina Marín built her fortune

The story of Carolina Marín does not fade with retirement. If anything, it becomes more interesting. At 32, she walks away from professional badminton not just as a champion, but as someone who turned years of hard work into lasting security. Her journey was never easy. It was loud, emotional, and fiercely competitive. Even when the noise of competition dies down, Marín is still a great example of how talent, discipline, and making good choices can change a life in ways that go beyond sports.

Article Title: Keith Thurman: After Floyd Mayweather Jr Manny Pacquiao gets called out by Keith Thurman for rematch if he upsets Sebastian Fundora in WBC super-welterweight title
Article Text:
Manny Pacquiao (via Getty Images)

Keith Thurman targets a redemption fight with Manny Pacquiao



The boxing world could be set for another blockbuster storyline as Keith Thurman targets a high-profile rematch with Manny Pacquiao. The American veteran is preparing for a crucial fight against Sebastian Fundora this weekend. Fundora will defend his WBC super-welterweight title in what promises to be a tough challenge. Thurman, who has been on a comeback path, is looking to prove he still belongs among boxing’s elite names.A win on Saturday night could change everything for Thurman. The former world champion is chasing history as he aims to become a two-weight world champion. More importantly, victory could open doors to massive fights later in 2026.One name that stands out is Pacquiao, the man who defeated him in 2019. Thurman now sees a second fight as a chance for redemption and a major payday in the later stage of his career.Keith Thurman has made it clear that he is open to facing Manny Pacquiao again if the opportunity comes. In the media huddle, he explained that he would gladly accept a rematch if the offer includes a strong financial package and a meaningful challenge.For him, the idea of sharing the ring again with Pacquiao is exciting because it gives him a chance to correct the past.Thurman admitted that there are still questions about whether Pacquiao would be willing to fight at a higher weight. However, that uncertainty does not reduce his interest. He believes the fight would still carry great value, especially because it would be a redemption story. Reflecting on their first bout, Thurman even suggested that he would have preferred a longer fight, similar to the old 15-round championship contests, as he feels it could have changed the outcome.Going into the weekend, Thurman is seen as the underdog against Sebastian Fundora. The champion has been impressive, with only one loss in his career which came against Brian Mendoza in 2023. Fundora’s height and reach make him a difficult opponent, and Thurman will need to be at his best to secure victory.Even if Thurman falls short, a rematch with Pacquiao could still remain an option. He may consider returning to the 147-pound division, where both fighters previously competed. Meanwhile, Pacquiao has a busy schedule ahead. He is expected to take part in an exhibition against Ruslan Provodnikov before a major showdown with Floyd Mayweather later in the year.For Thurman, everything depends on Saturday night. A win could bring him one step closer to redemption and another shot at one of boxing’s greatest names.
Article Summary: Keith thurman faces sebastian fundora in a wbc super-welterweight title fight on saturday night. Thurman is targeting a rematch with manny pacquiao, who he defeated in 2019. The american veteran is looking to prove he still belongs among boxing's elite names. A win could open doors to massive fights later in 2026.

Article Title: Jaylen Brown Injury Update: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles injury: How serious is it? Breaking down the risk for Boston
Article Text:
Image - X

Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach



In the world of the Boston Celtics, there is no word more terrifying than "Achilles." On Friday, that fear became a reality for the Green Team’s faithful when All-Star Jaylen Brown was officially ruled out for a pivotal matchup against the Atlanta Hawks.What started as a seemingly minor report of "left calf tightness" on Thursday was downgraded just hours before tip-off to left Achilles tendinitis. For a fan base that has spent the better part of a year watching Jayson Tatum recover from an Achilles rupture, the news felt like a cruel case of déjà vu.The first thing fans need to understand is the difference between tendinitis and a tear. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break.It is a common "overuse" injury for explosive athletes like Brown, who rely on jumping and quick lateral movements.While it is not a season-ending injury, it is a significant "red flag." If left untreated, chronic tendinitis can weaken the tendon, making it more susceptible to a serious rupture. By sitting Brown against the Hawks, the Celtics medical staff is choosing a "better safe than sorry" approach, prioritizing the upcoming 2026 playoffs over a late-March regular-season win.There is a silver lining for Brown’s individual accolades. Just before this injury sidelined him, Brown officially played his 65th game of the season. Under the NBA’s current rules, this makes him eligible for season-end awards like MVP and All-NBA.Brown has been the undisputed engine of the Celtics' offense this year, averaging a career-high 28.6 points per game. Having already hit that 65-game mark, both Brown and the Celtics now have the luxury of being extremely cautious with his recovery without worrying about his eligibility for the honors he has clearly earned.With Brown sidelined, the pressure shifts back to Jayson Tatum, who is still working his way back into a full rhythm after his own Achilles journey. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference, and every game counts.However, the team knows that a "Banner 19" run is impossible without a healthy Jaylen Brown. Expect the Celtics to use the "RICE" method (Rest, Ice, Compression, and Elevation) aggressively over the next week. While the word "Achilles" will always cause a panic in Boston, this move appears to be a calculated decision to ensure that the "Jays" are both standing tall when the postseason begins in April.
Article Summary: Jaylen brown ruled out with achilles tendinitis as celtics take playoff-first approach. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break. The celtics are currently battling the new york knicks for the no. 2 seed in the eastern conference.
